---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Veraxi
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run `make up` to start the stack...
2. Go to '...'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment:
 - OS: [e.g., macOS, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
 - Python version: [e.g., 3.10]
 - Flutter version: [e.g., 3.19]
 - Are you running via Docker? [Yes/No]

## Screenshots / Terminal Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste terminal error logs here to help explain your problem. Please wrap logs in triple backticks!
